title: Elegant Cream White Metal Flower Jug Vase, Farmhouse Galvanized Pitcher Vase, Rustic Decorative Milk Jug for Flowers
features: SHABBY CHIC DECOR – Unique attractive ribbed design in cream powder coated finish, bring an elegant French country charm and modern farmhouse feel to your home.
HIGH QUALITY - Made of galvanized zinc, a superior material to ensure sturdy and durability. It fits on any tabletops, work great as a gorgeous centerpiece.
LEAKPROOF DESIGN - It comes with a PVC liner insert, perfect for display artificial flowers, fresh cut flowers or greenery from your garden.

IDEAL GIFT - Great gift for your family or friends just about any occasions-celebrate holidays, birthdays, weddings, housewarming...which is truly a thoughtful gift that sure to put a smile on their face.
MEASUREMENT - 10.8"(27.5cm) Height x 6" (15cm) Base Diameter x 5.2" (13cm) Top Diameter.
description: Product Description Venalys is a brand which dedicated to create high-quality home decorations. With retro, beauty and elegant in mind, we strive to provide you the unique design with best quality and functional products to brighten up your home! Farmhouse Decor For Your Home Rustic Pitcher Vase This vintage metal flower vase features classic pitcher shape combined cream unique design with gold trim that achieves a charming country feel, perfectly blending into any space. Unique Design The unique attractive design make the vase a modern farmhouse decorative piece that would be stunning with or without flowers, it is a special addition to your home. Superior Quality Crafted from premium galvanized zinc and exquisite craftsmanship, this country style metal jug is sturdy and durable. It comes with a PVC insert, allows displaying various kinds of your favorite bouquet of fresh flowers. Some uses for this milk jug vase Flower arrangement If you enjoy a variety of flowers, you may well find that this vase is your preference. Arrange your favorite bouquet of flowers, make a pretty and unique display. Occasion As a gorgeous centerpiece, this pretty vase is suitable for various occasion: party, celebration or wedding... it will enhance the delightful atmosphere, you will also receive several compliments on it. Multi-purpose This rustic pitcher vase is versatile. Not only for flowers, it can also be used to storage, hold kitchen utensils,garden tools or simply empty as an accent piece in your home. Specification Material: Metal Color: Gloss cream with gold trim Package: 1 x Metal Vase (No Flowers) Size: 10.8"(27.5cm) Height x 6" (15cm) Base Diameter x 5.2" (13cm) Top Diameter. What are you waiting for? There are so many reasons to own one of these beautiful vases. Enjoy your vases now, a good life starts here.
